issues.description: Effect structure is fundamentally wrong. Card has a single OnPlay effect with a conditional second action. DSL incorrectly splits this into two separate effects (OnPlay and Trigger). The Rest action should be conditional on life count, not a separate trigger.
Second effect (Trigger + TrashFromHand + FlipLife) is completely fabricated. Card text contains no mention of trashing cards from hand or flipping life. This effect does not exist in the card text.
Rest action missing condition: should only resolve 'if you have 1 or less Life cards'. Current DSL has no conditional logic on the Rest action.
Rest target scope incomplete: 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is correct but should specify the cost filter (maxCost:4) is applied as a constraint.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this turn. Then, if you have 1 or less Life cards, rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less.
